job_posting:
Product Manager — Northwind Analytics (Denver, CO; hybrid)

Northwind Analytics is hiring a Product Manager to own the roadmap for our data platform. You'll partner with engineering, design, and customers to define and ship features that matter.

Responsibilities: own product discovery and delivery, write specs, prioritize the backlog, partner cross-functionally.
Requirements: demonstrated product management experience; strong written and verbal communication; experience with B2B SaaS analytics is a plus. We evaluate candidates on job-related competencies and provide reasonable accommodations throughout the process.

Salary range: $130,000-$165,000 plus equity, medical/dental/vision, 401(k) match, and 20 days PTO. We welcome applicants of all backgrounds and are an equal-opportunity employer.
